employee_eligibility_conditions.notes: Employment periods prior to a break in service of seven years or more need not be counted, except for breaks caused by military service obligation or written agreement.
employee_eligibility_conditions.source_text: A full- or part-time employee in California who has been employed for a total of at least 12 months (52 weeks) with the employer at any time prior to the commencement of a CFRA leave

employee_eligibility_conditions.notes: Hours must be actually worked within the meaning of the California Labor Code and Industrial Welfare Commission Wage Orders during the 12-month period immediately prior to the date the CFRA leave is to commence.
employee_eligibility_conditions.source_text: who has actually worked (within the meaning of the California Labor Code and Industrial Welfare Commission Wage Orders) for the employer at least 1,250 hours during the 12-month period immediately prior to the date the CFRA leave is to commence.
